{"society_power": 4.5, "state_power": 4.0, "society_change": -1.0, "state_change": 1.5, "key_event": "Dervish collapse and Italian conquest of sultanates", "reasoning": "The 1920 defeat of the Dervish movement and De Vecchi's forcible subjugation of the Majeerteen and Hobyo sultanates sharply expanded colonial despotic capacity, raising state power, while dismantling indigenous political authorities weakened organized society\u2014though resilient clan/xeer norms and nomadic mobility kept both from moving further."}
